rationale: Control case per answer key (group=control, no scheme). Dim1: output states misstatement_probability=40; control band 30<p<50 -> 1. Dim2: control -> null (rubric). Dim3: control -> nulls (rubric). Dim4: evidence is specific and verifiable-in-form: allowance for doubtful accounts $7,108K (2014-12-31, acc 0001274494-15-000033) -> $30K (2015-03-31, acc 0001274494-15-000012) while AR rose $135.4M -> $254.2M; NI/OCF divergence FY2012 (NI=-$96.3M vs OCF=+$762.2M) and FY2013 (NI=$353.0M vs OCF=$856.1M) from the FY2013 10-K; goodwill $433.3M -> $65.4M (FY2010->FY2011); warranty accrual $157.7M (2011) etc. These data points genuinely support the claims and are combined into a coherent multi-year narrative (AR/revenue ratio path 11%->16%->4%, reserve coverage collapse, non-cash charge attribution), and mechanism assertions on this control case are hedged with a benign alternative (goodwill impairment/warranty as genuine remediation). Consistency rule: p=40 permits watch/elevated; tier='watch' -> no cap. Score 3. Memorization condition 2: false - reasoning cites concrete provided data content rather than bare document lists, and no post-cutoff facts (revelation/enforcement/outcome) are referenced; naming First Solar's project/EPC business model is background, not post-cutoff outcome knowledge. Coverage note: p=40 with hypotheses provided satisfies the p>=40 hypothesis requirement, though dim2/dim3 are not scored for controls.
